title: Subject or Topic for [New Update] Section

posts.author: khoanghuy79 (Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,

We use a lot of updates section but there is not subject or topic to arrange our conversation but your email notification has this one:

therefore, I believe it is good if you can add in a field/area for us to type a topic or subject related liek this:

so our email notification on the subject line as [RFQ CHECK]… which is perfect for us.

I believe other companies have the same issue with us.

can you please if this can be added in your next improvement?

posts.author: rachelfb (Rachel Boone)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team would love to see a “subject line” field as part of the Updates function, so that conversations can be named and easily referenced.
